name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES state



Init == /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "idle"]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
    /\ state[i] = "idle"
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "trying"]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
    /\ state[i] = "trying"
    /\ \A j \in 1..N : j # i => state[j] # "critical"
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "critical"]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
    /\ state[i] = "critical"
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "idle"]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_state

====

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N, FiniteSubsets

VARIABLES participants, coordinator, messages

TypeOK ==
  /\ participants \in [1..N -> {"Init", "Prepared", "Committed", "Aborted"}]
  /\ coordinator \in {"Init", "Prepared", "Committed", "Aborted"}
  /\ messages \in FiniteSubsets({1..N, "Coordinator"} \times {"Prepare", "VoteYes", "VoteNo", "Commit", "Abort"})

Init ==
  /\ participants = [i \in 1..N |-> "Init"]
  /\ coordinator = "Init"
  /\ messages = {}

Prepare ==
  /\ coordinator = "Init"
  /\ coordinator' = "Prepared"
  /\ messages' = messages \union {("Coordinator", "Prepare")}

VoteYes ==
  /\ \E i \in 1..N : participants[i] = "Init"
  /\ \E i \in 1..N : messages = messages \union {("Coordinator", "Prepare")} \union {("Coordinator", "VoteYes") \union {("Coordinator", "VoteNo")}}
  /\ participants' = [participants EXCEPT ![i] = "Committed"]
  /\ coordinator' = "Committed"
  /\ messages' = {}

VoteNo ==
  /\ \E i \in 1..N : participants[i] = "Init"
  /\ \E i \in 1..N : messages = messages \union {("Coordinator", "Prepare")} \union {("Coordinator", "VoteYes") \union {("Coordinator", "VoteNo")}}
  /\ participants' = [participants EXCEPT ![i] = "Aborted"]
  /\ coordinator' = "Aborted"
  /\ messages' = {}

Next ==
  \/ Prepare
  \/ VoteYes
  \/ VoteNo

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<participants, coordinator, messages>>

====

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, state

(* State of each philosopher: "thinking", "hungry", or "eating" *)
Init == forks = [i \in 1..N |-> i] /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

(* Helper functions *)
Left(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
Right(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

CanEat(i) == forks[i] = i /\ forks[Right(i)] = Right(i)

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == \/ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ state[i] = "thinking"
          /\ forks[i] = i
          /\ forks[Right(i)] = Right(i)
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = i, ![Right(i)] = i]
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
        \/ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ state[i] = "eating"
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = i, ![Right(i)] = Right(i)]
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, state>>

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANT N

VARIABLES num, flag

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ flag[i] = FALSE
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
          /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + Max({IF flag[j] THEN num[j] ELSE 0 : j \in 1..N})]
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == 
  /\ q \in Seq(1..K)
  /\ head \in 1..K
  /\ tail \in 1..K
  /\ size \in 0..K

(* Initial state: empty queue *)
Init == 
  /\ q = <<>>
  /\ head = 1
  /\ tail = 1
  /\ size = 0

(* Producer action: enqueue an element *)
Enqueue(e) == 
  /\ size < K
  /\ q' = Append(q, e)
  /\ tail' = IF tail = K THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
  /\ size' = size + 1
  /\ head' = head

(* Consumer action: dequeue an element *)
Dequeue == 
  /\ size > 0
  /\ head' = IF head = K THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
  /\ size' = size - 1
  /\ q' = Tail(q)
  /\ tail' = tail

(* Next-state relation: either enqueue or dequeue *)
Next == 
  \E e \in 1..K : Enqueue(e) \/ Dequeue

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, size>>

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

TypeOK == /\ currentTerm \in Nat
        /\ votedFor \in {None} \/ [ServerId]
        /\ state \in {"Follower", "Candidate", "Leader"}

Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
       /\ votedFor = None
       /\ state = "Follower"

Next == \/ /\ state = "Follower"
          /\ state' = "Candidate"
          /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
          /\ votedFor' = None
       \/ /\ state = "Candidate"
          /\ state' = "Leader"
       \/ /\ state = "Leader"
          /\ state' = "Leader"

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

====
